---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the situation where you wanted this and it wasn't there.

## What you'd like

How you'd want it to work. Concrete examples beat abstract descriptions.

## Alternatives you considered

Any workarounds you tried, other tools that do this differently, etc.

## Out of scope

Be aware of `VISION.md` — some things are deliberately not in scope
(hosted SaaS, telemetry, native mobile apps, built-in trading product).
Check there first to avoid duplicating discussion.
